preservedBehaviors.description: SearchResultItem uses optional chaining for item properties and Array.isArray guard for tripDraft
SearchResultItem shows title || 'Untitled' fallback for missing titles
SearchResultItem computes showMemberTag and renders Member badge with #FDE68A color
SearchResultItem renders Perk badge for PERKS kind
Both components use withAlpha helper and Bookmark icon from lucide-react-native
